summary: v2.2 Production Hardening (Fixed Position Sizing) backend validation. All 202 pytest tests pass (2.05s). Module-level calculate_execution_lots boundary mapping verified for all 8 boundaries: 49999->2, 50000->3, 79999->3, 80000->4, 149999->4, 150000->5, 199999->5, 200000->6. FIXED_* constants (2.5/15/30/10) confirmed at module level. SIM path uses bot_state.sim_capital (default 200k) without invoking broker.get_net_available_cash. LIVE path calls broker inside try/except and returns error payload on failure (no silent fallback). _compute_auto_risk_lots payload includes mode='fixed', capital_source, calculated_lots, risk_amount, loss_per_lot. Deprecated test_position_sizing_v2.py removed; test_fixed_sizing_v22.py contains the new regression suite (15 tests observed; request stated 16 - minor doc discrepancy, all passing).
critical_code_review_comments: Doc drift: review_request claims 16 tests in test_fixed_sizing_v22.py (10 boundary + 6 SIM/LIVE); actual collected count is 15. Not a functional issue but update the sprint notes.
Parts 2 (restart recovery) and Part 3 (full UI cleanup) explicitly deferred per sprint scope - flagged as noted.
context_for_next_testing_agent: v2.2 fixed-sizing sprint verified green. Next sprint will introduce Part 2 (restart recovery) and Part 3 (full UI cleanup). Regression baseline: 202 passing tests including test_fixed_sizing_v22.py.
